title: Relate a cost to a label and get the total sum by label

posts.author: Sabu98 (Sandra Bustamante)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello

I’m working on a cost estimation template and I would like to relate each item to a specific label, later I want to have the total cost by label and in another board. Can you help me to figure out how to do it?

Thanks

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Sabu98

The app Rollup Multiple Boards can do that for you. There is a full video for this app to be found here.

The app might be an overkill because it rollup up multiple boards. It can do just one of course and I don’t know if you have more of the same boards where you want to aggregates costs (filtered by label) to another board.

posts.author: TeamEasy (Easy Mondays)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Sabu98

How many items do you need to account for? Can see a connected board solution working here very nicely pending any tricky details.

Give us a shout so we can get something together:

teameasy@easy-mondays.com

Team Easy
